data.title: Minimalist Design
data.description: Consistent minimalist aesthetics reflecting Apple's brand philosophy.
data.technical_spec: Clean lines, whitespace, and a focus on essential content across all pages.

data.title: Innovation-Driven
data.description: Emphasizes cutting-edge technology and innovation in products and web presence.
data.technical_spec: Showcases latest technologies and product features through interactive elements.

data.title: User-Centric Experience
data.description: Focuses on creating intuitive and smooth user experiences.
data.technical_spec: Highly intuitive interface designed with user feedback and experience in mind.

data.title: Eco-Friendly Narrative
data.description: Promotes sustainability and eco-friendly practices in design and communication.
data.technical_spec: Content emphasizing Apple’s commitment to sustainability throughout the website.

data.title: Privacy First
data.description: Communicates a strong stance on user privacy and data protection.
data.technical_spec: Prominent privacy settings and transparent information on data usage.
